surface_verification.runner: uv run --directory shared --extra dev pytest tests/test_churn_merge.py tests/test_resolve_churn_conflicts.py tests/test_worktree_isolation_lib.py tests/test_check_iterate_isolation.py tests/test_churn_merge_doc_sync.py -q
surface_verification.justification: Merge-resolver + leak-guard infra (no web/API/UI). Runner exercises triage dedup/validate (unit) + the resolver in real git merge-conflict repos (no-conflict dedup, --ours conflict reconcile, triage_invalid) + the leak-guard exemption + the CHURN_ALLOWLIST<->doc both-directions congruence. Full shared suite: 2781 passed (see degraded).

behaviors.behavior: triage dedup exact-line + no shared-id warning
triage_invalid status exit 4 on dropped header
leak-guard exempts tracked main-tree triage write
CHURN_ALLOWLIST <-> doc table congruent both directions

behaviors.reason: git union is dogfood-only; the resolver (tested) is the authority since union lacks dedup

degraded.condition: Full shared suite = 2781 passed / 23 skipped / 1 failed. The 1 failure is the same PRE-EXISTING local-only test_architecture_md_reflects_arch_impact (reads gitignored main-tree decision-drops; CI-green). In this worktree (off origin/main) it lists A/B/C1's drops — whose architecture.md entries ship in C1's PR #155 — plus the 4 non-campaign drifts tracked as trg-b61abfab. C2 itself flags NO architecture-impact (the campaign's arch narrative lives in C1's architecture.md block), so it adds nothing to the list.
